---
description: 'System table which contains properties of configured setting profiles.'

title: 'system.settings_profiles'
doc_type: 'reference'
---

## Description {#description}

Contains properties of configured setting profiles.

## Columns {#columns}

<!--AUTOGENERATED_START-->
- `name` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Setting profile name.
- `id` ([UUID](/sql-reference/data-types/uuid)) — Setting profile ID.
- `storage` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Path to the storage of setting profiles. Configured in the `access_control_path` parameter.
- `num_elements` ([UInt64](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) — Number of elements for this profile in the `system.settings_profile_elements` table.
- `apply_to_all` ([UInt8](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) — Shows that the settings profile set for all roles and/or users.
- `apply_to_list` ([Array(String)](/sql-reference/data-types/array)) — List of the roles and/or users to which the setting profile is applied.
- `apply_to_except` ([Array(String)](/sql-reference/data-types/array)) — The setting profile is applied to all roles and/or users excepting of the listed ones.
<!--AUTOGENERATED_END-->

## See Also {#see-also}

- [SHOW PROFILES](/sql-reference/statements/show#show-profiles)
